content.en:
Rumble!!!!

An incomparably huge magic circle covered the entire Extreme Dao True River, and a Zun True Realm Perfect Controller, the Extreme Realm Perfect Controller, was all over the nodes of the Extreme Dao True River.

With the help of this incomparably huge magic circle, layers of time and space were torn apart, and finally arrived at the primordial Black Sea.

You must know that even if you are a strong person who has comprehended the extreme path, you can only escape into the Primordial Black Sea, but if you want to introduce the energy of the Primordial Black Sea to the end of the realm, it is impossible to do it.

However, now, with the help of this magic circle, the energy of the primordial Black Sea has been unexpectedly activated.

A slender black ray of light pierced through the depths of endless time and space, entering the Extreme True River.

At this moment, all the perfect masters of the Three Realms sensed this black light.

"It's the energy of the primordial Black Sea, but it's too thin!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

But it's also normal, if it's too coarse, how much energy must be introduced into the Extreme Dao True River!

And now, this magic circle needs to open five billion eternal years before it can hope to elevate the Extreme Dao True River, so such a thin energy is normal.

"With the help of such a huge array, so many powerhouses can only attract such a little energy?"

Many Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers were shocked.

After all, among the perfect controllers of the extreme realm at the end of the realm, there are very few strong people who have comprehended the extreme path, and even the Lord of the Daoless and the Lord of the Ancient Realm have not comprehended an extreme path, and naturally they have never entered the Primordial Black Sea.

That's why these Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers were shocked.

However, the Lord of the Golden Body and the Lord of the White Night were very excited, so this circle really attracted the energy of the Primordial Black Sea, and they succeeded!

Even if there is less energy to attract, what does it matter, just attract slowly.

Anyway, according to their deduction, they can't attract much energy from the Primordial Black Sea, so they need to maintain the years of five billion eternal epochs.

As the energy of the primordial black sea poured into the origin of the Extreme Dao True River, the Extreme Dao True River began to undergo a slight change, but the time was very short, and there was no trace of it for the time being.

Time passed slowly, what should the cultivators of the Extreme Dao True River do, or what should they do, and ordinary cultivators could not perceive this magic circle, let alone those who were in the perfect control of the Three Realms in the magic circle.

However, the news here still leaked out.

After all, there are also spies at the end of the realm on the side of the Extreme Dao Deep Sea, and such a big thing naturally can't be hidden from the Extreme Dao Deep Sea Palace.

Soon, there were Extreme Dao creatures who had comprehended the Extreme Path and escaped into the Primordial Black Sea and descended to the Extreme True River at the end of the realm.

However, as soon as he arrived, he immediately fled, lest he be besieged and killed by the powerhouses of the end of the world.

"We're exposed!"

The Lord of the Pathless Dao is dignified.

The Extreme Dao Deep Sea and the End of the Realm are mortal enemies, and now that the powerhouses of the Extreme Dao Deep Sea know about their plan, they will definitely come to destroy it.

When the time comes, a large number of Extreme Realm Perfect Masters will descend here, and if they start a war with them, they will not be able to maintain this magic circle.

So, a Perfection Controller of the Extreme Realm asked the Lord of the Golden Body and the Lord of the White Night what they should do.

"Everyone, don't worry, keep maintaining the circle!"

The Lord of the White Night said.

Seeing this, many of the Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers breathed a sigh of relief, if they were to bring their bodies and fight with the Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers of the Extreme Deep Sea, they would not be willing.

They would rather give up the reward given by the Extreme Dao True River than withdraw.

But now it seems that there are still hole cards on the side of the Extreme Dao Zhenhe!

......

Extreme Dao Deep Sea Palace.

At this moment, here, a perfect controller of the Extreme Realm gathered,

In the blink of an eye, there were more than two thousand Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers gathered here.

In fact, the end of the realm doesn't know how many Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers there are in the Extreme Deep Sea, after all, there are too many Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers in the Extreme Deep Sea, and the True Realm Perfect Controllers break through to the Extreme Realm Perfect Controller, as long as they are not exposed, the Extreme Realm is naturally not clear.

Therefore, the number of Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers in the Extreme Dao Deep Sea Palace today is far more than two thousand.

Now, a slight transfer has brought together more than two thousand Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers.

And to be able to make so many Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers come as soon as possible, it was naturally the Abyss Palace Master, one of the thirteen Palace Masters.

The Abyss Palace Master is an incomparably special Extreme Dao Creature, an incomparably huge Abyss, which can devour all things, and has no consciousness when it is born, and countless Extreme Dao creatures have also entered his body to find resources, as a treasure land.

After endless years, the consciousness of the Abyss Palace Master was born, and he directly reached the realm of the perfect controller of the extreme realm, and then it didn't take too long to comprehend the abyss extreme path of the extreme realm.

Now, no one knows how many extreme realms the Abyss Palace Master has comprehended.

But the Abyss Palace Master is now the strongest person in the Extreme Dao Deep Sea, this is an undoubted thing, even the Blood Saint Palace Master does not dare to have the slightest idea of disobedience.

"Ladies and gentlemen, the Extreme Dao True River at the end of the realm is using a magic circle to connect the energy of the Primordial Black Sea, thereby transforming the Extreme Dao True River in a vain attempt to build the Extreme Dao True River into a second Extreme Dao Deep Sea. Of course, no matter how much the Extreme Dao True River transforms, it can't become the Extreme Deep Sea. But if they succeed, the Extreme Dao True River will provide a steady stream of Extreme Dao resources to the end of the realm in the future, which is a result that we are not allowed to see. The Abyss Palace Lord said.

"Abyss Palace Master, what should I do, attack the end of the realm?"

An Extreme Realm Perfect Controller asked.

"No, the price to pay for attacking is too great, but there is no problem in destroying their circle. They mainly dare to induce the energy of the primordial Black Sea, and we will destroy it once. The price they pay for building such a circle is also very high. They will definitely not dare to build again and again, and will eventually give up completely. The Abyss Palace Lord said.

"Yes, destroy their circle, and once it does, we will retreat immediately. The Blood Saint Palace Lord nodded.

"This time, I will go in person, and I will bring more than a thousand Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers with me, and I must destroy their magic circle. The Abyss Palace Lord said.

"Good!"

Many of the Extreme Realm Perfection Chapter masters agreed.

Subsequently, the perfect controller of the Extreme Realm who went to the end of the realm was chosen, and then entered the abdomen of the Abyss Palace Lord, and his abdomen was an abyss that could accommodate countless powerhouses.

In this way, the Abyss Palace Master could quickly go to the end of the realm by escaping directly into the Primordial Black Sea.

Otherwise, if those Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers went by themselves, they would not be able to escape into the Primordial Black Sea, and they would have to enter several portals of the Extreme Deep Sea and the End of the Realm, and then they would be too slow to hurry.

Airplanes!

The Abyss Palace Lord escaped into the Primordial Black Sea, and soon descended to the Extreme True River at the end of the realm.
